---
title: "Wetting transparency of graphene across length scales"
author: ["Yongkang Wang", "Yair Litman", "Minhaeng Cho", "Stephen J. Cox", "Mischa Bonn"]
date: 2026-04-10
publication: "Chem **12**, 103023 (2026)"
categories: ["interfaces", "water", "graphene"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chempr.2026.103023
url_preprint:
journ: "Chem"
issue: 12
page: "103023"
year: 2026
pub_number: 33
image: featured.jpg
---
